failures.description: The agent misunderstood or dropped the user's 'available' constraint by planning a search with available_only=false.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Vacuum Cleaner. At index 1, the Coordinator had enough information to preserve the availability constraint, but instead produced a plan_query with "available_only": false and explicitly described searching regardless of current availability. This violates a key user constraint and changes the objective from cheapest available item to cheapest item among all vacuum cleaners. The later tool result happened to contain an available item as the cheapest overall, but the root misalignment was introduced before the tool call.
